error_string: runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0

required_files.rationale: Contains the Jaeger datasource client that accesses first element of trace response slice without checking for empty response. Line ~248.
Test file updated in fix PR to cover the empty trace response case.

sufficient_files.rationale: Related trace processing code that helps understand the response structure.

error_chain: User queries Jaeger datasource for a trace ID
Jaeger API returns empty response (trace not found or expired)
client.go accesses response.Data[0] without length check
Go runtime panics with index out of range
Grafana returns 500 Internal Server Error to the frontend
trigger_conditions: Query Jaeger datasource with a trace ID that doesn't exist or has expired
Jaeger API returns an empty Data array in the response
Grafana Jaeger plugin processes the response without bounds check
